These results are not explained by differences in health care access, as proxied by socioeconomic status or distance to the nearest neonatal intensive care unit. We conclude that racial differences in fetal pulmonary maturation, rather than barriers to access, likely drove the uneven impact of SRT on neonatal mortality.
papers.abstract_zh: 医学创新是否加剧或减少种族健康差异仍是一个未解之谜。我们研究了肺表面活性剂替代疗法（SRT），这是一种针对患有呼吸障碍的早产儿的救命干预措施。在1989年获得FDA批准之前，早产黑人婴儿比白人婴儿更不可能因呼吸相关原因死亡。在FDA批准后的几年内，黑人和白人婴儿在呼吸相关新生儿死亡率方面的差距基本消失。利用1980-2000年的人口统计数据和非呼吸相关死亡率作为反事实结果，我们发现黑人和白人婴儿都从SRT的引入中受益，但白人新生儿的死亡率降低更大且更迅速。我们估计，到1993年，SRT使白人新生儿的呼吸相关死亡率降低了46%，而黑人新生儿降低了30%。这些结果不能用医疗保健获取差异来解释，如通过社会经济地位或距离最近的新生儿重症监护室的距离来代表。我们得出结论，胎儿肺部成熟度的种族差异，而不是获取障碍，可能是SRT对新生儿死亡率不均衡影响的驱动因素。

papers.title_en: Estimating the Present Value of R&D Tax Benefits in the United States
papers.title_zh: 估算美国研发税收优惠的现值
papers.authors: Brandon Pecoraro, Nicholas C. Hoffman, Martin Lopez-Daneri, Elena C. Derby, Rachel Moore, Shannon E. Sledz
papers.abstract_en: Using a panel of confidential corporate tax returns, we provide the first direct estimates of the realized present value of corporate tax benefits from R&D credits and deductions in the United States. Realized tax benefits can deviate from statutory tax benefits because firms in loss status are typically unable to fully utilize credits and deductions to offset current-year taxes and instead must carry these attributes forward. We develop a novel procedure to track the intertemporal firm-level utilization of tax attributes generated by corporate R&D spending, and find that the present value of R&D tax benefits varies substantially with firmsâ loss status, age, and size. Old and large firms typically use R&D tax benefits quickly, while young firms â especially those that are small â frequently operate in loss status and use tax attributes more slowly. From 2012â2016, the average firm generated $0.41 in statutory tax benefits per dollar of R&D investment, with a realized present value of $0.36. Young and small firms in a loss position realized only $0.23 per dollar, a 44% decrease relative to the statutory benchmark.
papers.abstract_zh: 利用一系列保密的企业税务申报数据，我们首次直接估算了美国企业从研发税收抵免和扣除中获得的实际现值税收利益。实际税收利益可能与法定税收利益不同，因为亏损状态的公司通常无法充分利用抵免和扣除来抵消当年税收，而必须将这些属性结转。我们开发了一种新的方法来追踪企业研发支出产生的税收属性的跨时期利用情况，并发现研发税收利益的现值与公司的亏损状态、年龄和规模有显著差异。年长和大型公司通常迅速使用研发税收利益，而年轻公司——尤其是小型公司——经常处于亏损状态，更慢地使用税收属性。从2012年到2016年，平均每家企业每投入1美元研发投资，就产生了0.41美元的法定税收利益，实际现值为0.36美元。处于亏损状态的年轻和小型公司每投入1美元，实际现值仅为0.23美元，比法定基准减少了44%。

papers.title_en: Fiscal Policy and Transition Risk
papers.title_zh: 财政政策与转型风险
papers.authors: Stefano Carattini, Garth Heutel, Givi Melkadze, InÃ¨s Mourelon
papers.abstract_en: We study how climate policy can interact with distortionary fiscal policy and potentially lead to transition risk. Using an environmental dynamic stochastic general equilibrium model that features financial frictions and preexisting labor and capital taxes, we simulate a carbon tax and an abatement subsidy under different scenarios for returning carbon tax revenue or financing the subsidy. We find novel policy implications and important differences between the carbon tax and the subsidy. Under both policies, transition dynamics can differ sharply from long-run outcomes. For the carbon tax, transition dynamics depend on both financial frictions and the choice of revenue recycling. For the abatement subsidy, distortionary financing can generate contractionary transition dynamics, because of financial frictions. Macroprudential policy can mitigate transition risk under the carbon tax but has little effect under the subsidy.
papers.abstract_zh: 我们研究了气候政策如何与扭曲性财政政策相互作用，可能导致转型风险。我们使用一个包含金融摩擦和现有劳动与资本税的环境动态随机一般均衡模型，模拟了在不同情景下返还碳税收入或为补贴融资的碳税和减排补贴。我们发现了碳税和补贴之间的新颖政策含义和重要差异。在两种政策下，转型动态可能与长期结果截然不同。对于碳税，转型动态取决于金融摩擦和收入再循环的选择。对于减排补贴，扭曲性融资可能因金融摩擦而产生收缩性转型动态。宏观审慎政策可以在碳税下减轻转型风险，但在补贴下效果甚微。

papers.title_en: Trust and Innovation Within the Firm: Evidence from Matched CEO-Firm Data
papers.title_zh: 企业内部信任与创新：基于匹配的CEO-企业数据的证据
papers.authors: Kieu-Trang Nguyen
papers.abstract_en: Abstract This article shows that a CEO’s trust enhances innovation within a firm, providing a novel micro-foundation for the well-known trust-growth relationship. I build a new matched CEO-firm-patent data set covering 5,753 CEOs in 3,598 U.S. public firms and 700,000 patents during 2000–2011. I exploit variation in generalized trust across CEO ethnic origins, inferred from their last names using deanonymized historical censuses. Following CEO turnovers, a one standard deviation increase in a CEO’s generalized trust is associated with 6% more future patents and 4%–6% higher average patent quality, driven entirely by higher-quality patents. Text analysis of employee reviews shows that the CEO’s trust enhances a firm’s trust culture. These results are consistent with insights from qualitative interviews suggesting that the CEO's trust and the firm’s trust culture encourage researchers to undertake high-risk explorative research and development. In addition, changes in the CEO’s bilateral trust toward inventors in different countries have comparable effects on inventors’ patenting, controlling for CEO and other fixed effects.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 本文表明，CEO的信任能够增强公司内部的创新，为广为人知的信任-增长关系提供了新的微观基础。我构建了一个新的匹配的CEO-公司-专利数据集，涵盖了2000-2011年间美国3598家上市公司的5753位CEO和70万项专利。我利用CEO族裔起源中普遍信任的变化，这些变化是从他们的姓氏中推断出来的，使用的是去匿名化的历史人口普查数据。在CEO更迭后，CEO普遍信任的一个标准差增加与未来专利数量增加6%和平均专利质量提高4%-6%相关，这完全是由更高质量的专利驱动的。对员工评价的文本分析显示，CEO的信任增强了公司的信任文化。这些结果与定性访谈的见解一致，表明CEO的信任和公司的信任文化鼓励研究人员进行高风险的探索性研究和开发。此外，控制CEO和其他固定效应后，CEO对不同国家发明家的双边信任变化对发明家的专利申请有类似的影响。

papers.title_en: The Macroeconomic Impact of Climate Change: Global Versus Local Temperature
papers.title_zh: 气候变化的宏观经济影响：全球与局部温度
papers.authors: Adrien Bilal, Diego R Känzig
papers.abstract_en: Abstract This article estimates that the macroeconomic damages from climate change are an order of magnitude larger than previously thought. Exploiting natural global temperature variability, we find that 1ºC warming reduces world GDP by over 20% in the long run. Global temperature correlates strongly with extreme climatic events, unlike country-level temperature used in previous work, explaining our larger estimate. We use this evidence to estimate damage functions in a neoclassical growth model. Business-as-usual warming implies a present welfare loss of more than 30%, and a social cost of carbon in excess of $1,200 per ton. These impacts suggest that unilateral decarbonization policy is cost-effective for large countries such as the United States.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 本文估计气候变化对宏观经济的损害比之前认为的要大一个数量级。利用全球自然温度的变异性，我们发现1摄氏度的升温在长期内会减少世界GDP超过20%。全球温度与极端气候事件的关联性很强，与之前研究中使用的国家层面温度不同，这解释了我们更大的估计值。我们利用这一证据在新古典增长模型中估计损害函数。按照当前趋势的升温意味着当前福利损失超过30%，碳的社会成本超过每吨1200美元。这些影响表明，对于像美国这样的大国来说，单边脱碳政策是划算的。

papers.title_en: Insuring Peace: Index-Based Livestock Insurance, Droughts, and Conflict
papers.title_zh: 标题：保障和平：基于指数的牲畜保险、干旱与冲突
papers.authors: Kai Gehring, Paul Schaudt
papers.abstract_en: Abstract We provide quasi-experimental evidence of how an innovative market-based solution using remote-sensing technology can mitigate drought-induced conflict. Droughts are a major driver of conflict in Africa, particularly between transhumant pastoralists and sedentary farmers. Index-Based Livestock Insurance (IBLI), a program piloted in Kenya, provides automated, preemptive payouts to pastoralists affected by droughts. Combining variation in rainfall and the staggered rollout of IBLI in Kenya over 2000–2020, we find that IBLI strongly reduces drought-induced conflict. Key mechanisms include a reduction in herd sizes, as well as income smoothing and asset price stabilization, contributing to an overall reduced migratory pressure for pastoralists. Our study suggests that market-based solutions are a scalable, cost-effective pathway to mitigate conflict, complementing political solutions such as power-sharing agreements and institutional reforms.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：我们提供了一种创新的基于市场的解决方案，利用遥感技术减轻干旱引发的冲突的准实验证据。干旱是非洲冲突的主要驱动因素，特别是在游牧民和定居农民之间。基于指数的牲畜保险（IBLI）项目在肯尼亚试点，为受干旱影响的牧民提供自动化、预防性的赔付。结合肯尼亚2000-2020年间降雨量的变化和IBLI的分阶段推广，我们发现IBLI显著减少了干旱引发的冲突。关键机制包括减少畜群规模，以及收入平滑和资产价格稳定，有助于降低牧民的整体迁移压力。我们的研究表明，基于市场的解决方案是减轻冲突的可扩展、成本效益高的途径，补充了权力共享协议和制度改革等政治解决方案。

papers.title_en: Automation and Rent Dissipation: Implications for Wages, Inequality, and Productivity
papers.title_zh: 自动化与租金耗散：对工资、不平等和生产率的影响
papers.authors: Daron Acemoglu, Pascual Restrepo
papers.abstract_en: Abstract This article studies the effects of automation in a task-based economy in which some jobs pay workers rents—wages above workers' outside options. We show that automation targets high-rent tasks, dissipating rents, amplifying wage losses, and reducing within-group wage dispersion in exposed groups. This form of rent dissipation is inefficient and offsets the productivity gains from automation. Using U.S. data from 1980 to 2016, we find evidence of sizable rent dissipation and reduced within-group wage dispersion due to automation. Automation accounts for 52% of the increase in between-group inequality since 1980, with rent dissipation explaining one-fifth of this total. Our estimates imply that inefficient rent dissipation has offset 60%–90% of the productivity gains from automation over this period.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 本文研究了在基于任务的经济中自动化的影响，其中一些工作支付给工人租金——即高于工人其他选择的工资。我们表明，自动化针对的是高租金任务，消耗租金，放大工资损失，并减少受影响群体内部的工资差异。这种租金消耗是低效的，抵消了自动化带来的生产率提升。利用1980年至2016年的美国数据，我们发现由于自动化导致大量租金消耗和群体内部工资差异减少的证据。自动化解释了1980年以来群体间不平等增加的52%，其中租金消耗解释了这一总数的五分之一。我们的估计意味着，在这一时期，低效的租金消耗抵消了60%至90%的自动化带来的生产率提升。

papers.title_en: Algorithm Design: A Fairness-Accuracy Frontier
papers.title_zh: 算法设计：公平与准确性的边界
papers.authors: Annie Liang, Jay Lu, Xiaosheng Mu, Kyohei Okumura

papers.title_en: Firm Accommodation After Workplace Disability: Labor Market Impacts and Implications for Subsidy Design
papers.title_zh: 工作场所残疾后的企业适应：对劳动市场的影响及对补贴设计的含义
papers.authors: Naoki Aizawa, Corina Mommaerts, Stephanie Rennane
papers.abstract_en: This paper studies the labor market impacts of firm accommodation decisions after workplace disability and assesses implications for the design of firm subsidies. We leverage a workers' compensation (WC) program in Oregon that provides wage subsidies to firms for accommodating workers with workplace disabilities. Leveraging rich administrative data and a policy change to the wage subsidy, we show that accommodation rates respond to the subsidy rate and that receipt of accommodation leads to a significant increase in employment and earnings a year later. To explore welfare implications, we develop and estimate a frictional labor market model of accommodation as a form of human capital investment. Worker turnover and imperfect experience rating in WC lead to underaccommodation and inefficient labor market outcomes after workplace disability. Counterfactual simulations show that subsidizing accommodation not only improves long‐run labor market outcomes of workers experiencing work‐related disability but also yields welfare gains for most workers.
papers.abstract_zh: 本文研究了工作场所残疾后企业适应性决策对劳动力市场的影响，并评估了对企业补贴设计的影响。我们利用俄勒冈州的一项工人赔偿（WC）计划，该计划为企业适应工作场所残疾的工人提供工资补贴。利用丰富的行政数据和对工资补贴政策的变更，我们展示了适应率对补贴率的响应，以及接受适应性调整导致一年后就业和收入显著增加。为了探索福利含义，我们开发并估计了一个摩擦性劳动力市场的适应性模型，将适应性作为一种人力资本投资形式。WC中的工人流动和不完善的经验评级导致工作场所残疾后适应性不足和劳动力市场效率低下。反事实模拟表明，补贴适应性不仅可以改善经历工作相关残疾的工人的长期劳动力市场结果，而且还能为大多数工人带来福利收益。

papers.title_en: The Complexity of Multidimensional Learning in Agriculture
papers.title_zh: 农业中多维学习的复杂性
papers.authors: Rachid Laajaj, Karen Macours
papers.abstract_en: Studies on agricultural technology adoption often focus on one input, practice, or package, which is analytically useful, but may overlook the complexities involved with multidimensional learning needed for a lot of agricultural decisions. In Kenya, we study farmers' dynamic learning (from oneself and others) and adoption decisions over six seasons after randomly inviting them to participate in agronomic research trials, comparing different combinations of inputs during three consecutive seasons. As a response to the trials, adoption increases steadily despite the absence of positive profits multiple seasons after exposure to the trials. Know‐how increases rapidly and faster for high skill farmers who experiment the most, at the cost of making new mistakes. The findings are consistent with a theoretical model with multidimensionality of input and practice decisions and differential learning from one's own experience by skills, where complementarities imply that adoption of an input requires finding how to re‐optimize other dimensions, which adds to the cost of adoption.
papers.abstract_zh: 研究农业技术采纳往往关注单一投入、实践或一揽子方案，这在分析上是有用的，但可能忽视了农业决策中多维学习所需的复杂性。在肯尼亚，我们研究了农民在随机邀请参加农艺研究试验后六个季节的动态学习（自我学习和向他人学习）和采纳决策，比较了三个连续季节中不同投入组合的效果。作为对试验的响应，尽管在接触试验后多个季节没有获得正利润，采纳率仍在稳步提高。知识技能增长迅速，对于技能较高的农民来说增长更快，他们进行的实验最多，但代价是犯新错误。这些发现与一个理论模型一致，该模型考虑了投入和实践决策的多维性以及不同技能水平下从个人经验中学习的差异性，其中互补性意味着采纳一种投入需要找到如何重新优化其他维度的方法，这增加了采纳的成本。

papers.title_en: An Experimental Evaluation of Deferred Acceptance: Evidence From Over 100 Army Officer Labor Markets
papers.title_zh: 标题：延迟接受机制的实验评估：来自100多个军官劳动市场的证据
papers.authors: Jonathan M.V. Davis, Kyle Greenberg, Damon Jones
papers.abstract_en: Internal labor markets are increasingly important for matching workers to jobs within organizations. We present evidence from a randomized trial that compares matching workers to jobs using the deferred acceptance (DA) algorithm to the traditional manager‐directed matching process. Our setting is the U.S. Army's internal labor market, which matches over 14,000 officers to units annually. We find that DA reduces administrative burden and increases match quality as measured by reduced justified envy, increased truthful preference reporting, and officers' and units' preferences over their matches. The overall impact of DA on officer retention and performance in the two years after officers started their new jobs is limited by strategic preference coordination between officers and units. However, DA leads to significant improvements in officer retention and promotions in markets with inexperienced managers. Our findings suggest that cross‐market communication between agents in internal labor markets can attenuate the benefits of strategyproof matching algorithms.
papers.abstract_zh: 内部劳动力市场在组织内匹配工人和工作方面越来越重要。我们通过随机试验提供了证据，比较了使用延迟接受（DA）算法匹配工人和工作与传统的经理指导匹配过程。我们的研究背景是美国军队的内部劳动力市场，该市场每年将超过14,000名军官匹配到单位。我们发现，DA减少了行政负担，并通过减少合理的嫉妒、增加真实的偏好报告以及军官和单位对他们匹配的偏好来提高匹配质量。DA对军官在新工作开始后两年内的留存和表现的整体影响受到军官和单位之间策略性偏好协调的限制。然而，DA在有经验不足经理的市场中，显著提高了军官的留存和晋升。我们的发现表明，内部劳动力市场中跨市场沟通的代理可以减弱策略证明匹配算法的好处。

papers.title_en: The Geography of Business Dynamism and Skill-Biased Technical Change
papers.title_zh: 商业活力的地理分布与技能偏向型技术变革
papers.authors: Hannah Rubinton
papers.abstract_en: Abstract This paper shows that the growing disparities between big and small cities in the U.S. since 1980 can be explained by firms endogenously responding to a skill-biased technology shock. With the introduction of a new skill-biased technology that is high fixed cost but low marginal cost, firms endogenously adopt more in big cities, cities that offer abundant amenities for high-skilled workers, and cities that are more productive in using high-skilled labour. In cities with more adoption, small and unproductive firms are more likely to exit the market, increasing the equilibrium rate of turnover or business dynamism—a selection effect similar to Melitz (2003). Differences in technology adoption and selection account for three key components of the growing regional disparities, known as the Great Divergence: (1) big cities saw a larger increase in the relative wages and supply of skilled workers, (2) big cities saw a smaller decline in business dynamism, and (3) firms in big cities invest more intensively in information and communication technology.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 本文表明，自1980年以来美国大城市与小城市之间日益扩大的差距可以通过企业对技能偏向型技术冲击的内生反应来解释。随着一项新的技能偏向型技术的引入，这项技术具有高固定成本但低边际成本，企业在大城市内生性地采用更多，这些城市为高技能工人提供了丰富的便利设施，并且在使用高技能劳动力方面更具生产力。在采用技术更多的城市中，小型和低效企业更有可能退出市场，增加了市场更替或商业活力的均衡率——这是一种类似于Melitz（2003年）的选择效应。技术采用和选择的差异解释了日益扩大的区域差异的三个关键组成部分，即所谓的“大分化”：（1）大城市看到技能工人的相对工资和供应量增长更大，（2）大城市看到商业活力的下降幅度更小，（3）大城市的企业在信息和通信技术方面的投资更为密集。

papers.title_en: Estimating Welfare Effects in a Non-Parametric Choice Model: The Case of School Vouchers
papers.title_zh: 非参数选择模型中的福利效应估计：以学校代金券为例
papers.authors: Vishal Kamat, Samuel Norris
papers.abstract_en: Abstract We develop new robust discrete choice tools to learn about the average willingness to pay for a price subsidy and its effects on demand given exogenous, discrete variation in prices. Our starting point is a non-parametric, non-separable model of choice. We exploit the insight that our welfare parameters in this model can be expressed as functions of demand for the different alternatives. However, while the variation in the data reveals the value of demand at the observed prices, the parameters generally depend on its values beyond these prices. We show how to sharply characterize what we can learn when demand is specified to be entirely non-parametric or to be parametrized in a flexible manner, both of which imply that the parameters are not necessarily point identified. We use our tools to analyse the welfare effects of price subsidies provided by school vouchers in the DC Opportunity Scholarship Program. We find that the provision of the status quo voucher and a wide range of counterfactual vouchers of different amounts can have positive and potentially large benefits net of costs. The positive effect can be explained by the popularity of low-tuition schools in the programme; removing them from the programme can result in a negative net benefit. We also find that various standard logit specifications, in comparison, limit attention to demand functions with low demand for the voucher, which do not capture the large magnitudes of benefits credibly consistent with the data.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：我们开发了新的稳健离散选择工具，以了解对价格补贴的平均支付意愿及其对需求的影响，这些影响是在价格的外生、离散变化给定的情况下得出的。我们的出发点是一个非参数、非可分的选择模型。我们利用这样一个洞见：在这个模型中，我们的福利参数可以表示为不同选择的需求函数。然而，尽管数据中的变化揭示了在观察到的价格下需求的价值，但参数通常依赖于这些价格之外的需求值。我们展示了在需求被指定为完全非参数化或以灵活的方式参数化时，我们可以学到什么，这两种情况都意味着参数不一定是点识别的。我们使用这些工具来分析华盛顿特区机会奖学金计划中学校代金券提供的价格补贴的福利效应。我们发现，提供现状代金券和一系列不同金额的反事实代金券可以带来积极且可能巨大的净收益。这种积极效应可以通过项目中低学费学校的受欢迎程度来解释；将它们从项目中移除可能导致负的净收益。我们还发现，与此相比，各种标准逻辑规范限制了对代金券需求低的需求函数的关注，这些函数无法可信地捕捉与数据一致的福利的巨大规模。

papers.title_en: Counterfactual Identification and Latent Space Enumeration in Discrete Outcome Models
papers.title_zh: 反事实识别与离散结果模型中的潜在空间枚举
papers.authors: Jiaying Gu, Thomas M Russell, Thomas Stringham
papers.abstract_en: Abstract This article provides a unified framework for studying the identification of counterfactual parameters in a general class of discrete outcome models, allowing for endogenous regressors and multidimensional latent variables, all without parametric distributional assumptions. Our main theoretical result is that, when the covariates are discrete, the infinite-dimensional latent variable distribution can be replaced with a finite-dimensional version that is equivalent from an identification perspective. The finite-dimensional latent variable distribution is constructed in practice by enumerating regions of the latent variable space with a new and efficient cell enumeration algorithm for hyperplane arrangements. We then show that bounds on a certain class of counterfactual parameters can be computed by solving a sequence of linear programming problems, and show how the researcher can introduce additional assumptions as constraints in the linear programmes. Finally, we apply the method to a mobile phone choice example with heterogeneous choice sets, and to an airline entry game example.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 本文提供了一个统一框架，用于研究在一类离散结果模型中识别反事实参数，这些模型允许内生回归变量和多维潜在变量，且无需参数分布假设。我们的主要理论结果是，当协变量是离散的时，无限维潜在变量分布可以用一个有限维版本替代，从识别角度来看是等价的。在实践中，通过使用一种新的高效单元枚举算法来枚举潜在变量空间的区域，构建有限维潜在变量分布。然后我们展示了如何通过解决一系列线性规划问题来计算某类反事实参数的界限，并展示了研究者如何在线性规划中引入额外的假设作为约束。最后，我们将该方法应用于具有异质选择集的手机选择示例，以及航空公司进入游戏示例。

papers.title_en: Information Frictions and Employee Sorting between Start-ups
papers.title_zh: 信息摩擦与员工在初创企业间的筛选
papers.authors: Kevin A. Bryan, Mitchell Hoffman, Amir Sariri
papers.abstract_en: Would workers apply to better firms if they were more informed about firm quality? Collaborating with 26 science-based start-ups, we create a custom job board and invite business school alumni to apply. The job board randomizes across applicants to show coarse expert ratings of all start-ups' science and/or business model quality. Making ratings visible strongly reallocates applications toward higher-rated firms. This reallocation holds, restricting to high-quality workers. Treatments operate in part by shifting worker beliefs about firms' right-tail outcomes. Despite these benefits, workers make posttreatment bets indicating highly overoptimistic beliefs about start-up success, suggesting a problem of broader informational deficits. (JEL D22, D83, J22, J23, J24, M13, M51)
papers.abstract_zh: 如果工人对公司质量了解更多，他们会选择更好的公司吗？我们与26家基于科学的初创公司合作，创建了一个定制的招聘板，并邀请商学院校友申请。招聘板随机向申请者展示所有初创公司科学和/或商业模式质量的粗略专家评级。使评级可见显著地重新分配了申请，使其倾向于评级更高的公司。这种重新分配在限制到高质量工人时仍然成立。处理部分通过改变工人对公司右尾结果的信念来运作。尽管有这些好处，工人在治疗后做出的赌注表明，他们对初创公司成功的信念过于乐观，这表明存在更广泛的信息赤字问题。（JEL D22, D83, J22, J23, J24, M13, M51）

papers.title_en: Cooking, Health, and Daily Exposure to Pollution Spikes
papers.title_zh: 标题：烹饪、健康与日常暴露于污染峰值
papers.authors: Susanna B. Berkouwer, Joshua T. Dean
papers.abstract_en: Many routine daily activities—such as cooking and commuting—cause large recurring pollution spikes that may impact health without significantly affecting average exposure. We study pollution spikes by combining experimental variation in cooking technology with high-frequency data on individual pollution exposure and time-use in Kenya. Improved cookstoves reduce PM2.5 spikes while cooking by 51.3 μg/m 3 (41 percent) and cause a 0.24 standard deviation reduction in self-reported respiratory symptoms. However, even after more than three years of daily use, we find no clinical health improvements, possibly because we detect no impact on average exposure. Clinical health improvements may require reductions in ambient concentrations. (JEL I12, O12, O13, Q51, Q53)
papers.abstract_zh: 许多日常活动，如烹饪和通勤，会导致大规模的周期性污染峰值，这可能会影响健康，但不会显著影响平均暴露水平。我们通过结合肯尼亚烹饪技术实验变化和高频个人污染暴露及时间使用数据，研究污染峰值。改进的炉灶在烹饪过程中减少了51.3微克/立方米（41%）的PM2.5峰值，并导致自报呼吸症状的标准差降低了0.24。然而，即使在三年多的每日使用后，我们发现没有临床健康改善，可能是因为我们没有检测到对平均暴露的影响。临床健康改善可能需要降低环境浓度。（JEL I12, O12, O13, Q51, Q53）

papers.title_en: Adjustable Product Attributes, Indirect Network Effects, and Subsidy Design: The Case of Electric Vehicles
papers.title_zh: 可调整产品属性、间接网络效应与补贴设计：以电动汽车为例
papers.authors: Kevin Remmy
papers.abstract_en: This paper develops a structural model of endogenous product attribute choice in the presence of indirect network effects to study electric vehicle (EV) subsidies. Using data on the German EV market, I find that a support scheme almost doubled EV sales but substantially affected EVs’ price and driving range. These adjustments create a trade-off between optimizing different policy objectives when designing subsidies. Large purchase subsidies maximize EV sales, whereas large charging station subsidies maximize consumer and total surplus. The results suggest that maximizing EV sales can lead to unintended consequences in the form of price and range adjustments. (JEL D12, D22, D85, H25, L14, L62, R41)
papers.abstract_zh: 本文构建了一个在间接网络效应存在下内生产品属性选择的结构模型，以研究电动汽车（EV）补贴。利用德国电动汽车市场的数据，我发现支持计划几乎使电动汽车销量翻倍，但显著影响了电动汽车的价格和续航里程。这些调整在设计补贴时创造了优化不同政策目标之间的权衡。大规模购买补贴最大化电动汽车销量，而大规模充电站补贴最大化消费者和总剩余。结果表明，最大化电动汽车销量可能导致价格和续航里程调整的意外后果。（JEL D12, D22, D85, H25, L14, L62, R41）

papers.title_en: The Effect of Mergers on Innovation
papers.title_zh: 合并对创新的影响
papers.authors: Kaustav Das, Tatiana Mayskaya, Arina Nikandrova
papers.abstract_en: We study the effect of a merger on R&D activity in a dynamic model with uncertainty about the feasibility of innovation. The merger has three effects: It may reduce the number of follow-up innovations (cannibalization effect), increase the probability of the first game-changer innovation (appropriability effect), and bring this innovation forward in time (informational effect). The model suggests mergers are more desirable when R&D outcomes are highly uncertain, but less so when the innovation path is clearer. A surprising policy implication is that the benefit of the merger may be higher if the first and subsequent innovations are closer substitutes. (JEL D21, D83, G34, O31)
papers.abstract_zh: 我们在一个存在创新可行性不确定性的动态模型中研究了并购对研发活动的影响。并购有三个效应：它可能减少后续创新的数量（蚕食效应），增加首次突破性创新的概率（可占有性效应），并将这一创新提前（信息效应）。模型表明，当研发结果高度不确定时，并购更受欢迎，但在创新路径更清晰时则不那么受欢迎。一个令人惊讶的政策含义是，如果首次和后续创新更接近替代品，那么并购的收益可能更高。（JEL D21, D83, G34, O31）

papers.title_en: The Organization of Innovation: Incomplete Contracts and the Outsourcing Decision
papers.title_zh: 标题：创新组织：不完全合同与外包决策
papers.authors: Thomas Jungbauer, Sean Nicholson, June Pan, Michael Waldman, Lucy Xiaolu Wang
papers.abstract_en: Why do firms outsource research and development (R&D) for some products while conducting R&D in-house for similar ones? An innovating firm risks cannibalizing its existing products. The more profitable these products, the more the firm wants to limit cannibalization. We apply this logic to the organization of R&D by introducing a novel theoretical model in which developing in-house provides the firm more control over the new product’s location in product space. An empirical analysis of our testable predictions using pharmaceutical data concerning patents, patent expiration, and outsourcing at various stages of the R&D process supports our theoretical approach. (JEL D21, D22, L22, L24, L65, O31, O34)
papers.abstract_zh: 为什么企业会将某些产品的的研发（R&D）外包，而对类似产品则在内部进行研发？创新企业面临现有产品被蚕食的风险。这些产品越有利可图，企业就越希望限制蚕食。我们将这一逻辑应用于研发的组织中，引入了一个新颖的理论模型，其中内部开发为企业提供更多对新产品在产品空间中位置的控制。我们使用有关专利、专利到期和研发各阶段外包的制药数据，对可测试的预测进行实证分析，支持我们的理论方法。（JEL D21, D22, L22, L24, L65, O31, O34）

journals.name: Review of Economics and Statistics
journals.resolved_name: The Review of Economics and Statistics

papers.title_en: Is the Patent System Sensitive to Incorrect Information?
papers.title_zh: 专利体系对错误信息敏感吗？
papers.authors: Janet Freilich, Soomi Kim
papers.abstract_en: Abstract We investigate whether participants in the patent system are sensitive to information quality by examining how they treat inaccurate information. We use a novel approach to identify patents with inaccurate information: patent-paper pairs where the paper has been retracted and the corresponding patent contains the retracted material. Despite containing inaccurate information, we find that these patents are prosecuted and maintained by many applicants, are not rejected by examiners, and continue to be cited by some downstream readers after retraction. Insensitivity to inaccurate information may lead to erroneous decisions during examination and has implications for patent quality, disclosure, and knowledge flows.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：我们通过研究专利系统参与者如何处理不准确信息，来调查他们是否对信息质量敏感。我们采用一种新方法来识别包含不准确信息的专利：论文被撤回，而相应的专利包含被撤回材料的专利-论文配对。尽管包含不准确信息，我们发现这些专利仍被许多申请人起诉和维护，没有被审查员拒绝，并且在撤回后仍被一些下游读者引用。对不准确信息的不敏感可能导致审查过程中的错误决策，并对专利质量、信息披露和知识流动产生影响。

papers.title_en: Regulatory Incentives for Innovation: The FDA's Breakthrough Therapy Designation
papers.title_zh: 标题：创新的监管激励：FDA的突破性疗法认定
papers.authors: Amitabh Chandra, Jennifer Kao, Kathleen L. Miller, Ariel D. Stern
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Regulators of new products confront a trade-off between speeding a product to market and collecting additional product quality information. The FDA's Breakthrough Therapy Designation (BTD) provides an opportunity to understand if regulators can use new policy to innovate around this trade-off. We find that the BTD program shortened clinical development times by 23% and did not affect the ex post safety profile of drugs with the designation. The BTD program had the greatest impact on less experienced firms and reduced clinical trial design complexity. The results suggest that targeted regulatory innovation can shorten R&D periods without compromising product quality.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：新产品监管者在加快产品上市与收集更多产品质量信息之间面临权衡。美国食品药品监督管理局（FDA）的突破性疗法认定（BTD）提供了一个机会，以了解监管者是否能够利用新政策在这一权衡中进行创新。我们发现，BTD计划将临床开发时间缩短了23%，并且没有影响获得认定药物的事后安全性概况。BTD计划对经验较少的公司影响最大，并降低了临床试验设计的复杂性。结果表明，针对性的监管创新可以在不牺牲产品质量的情况下缩短研发周期。

papers.title_en: Rising U.S. Income Inequality and Declining Residential Electricity Consumption: Is There a Link?
papers.title_zh: 美国收入不平等上升与住宅电力消费下降：二者之间是否存在联系？
papers.authors: Joshua Linn, Jing Liang, Yueming (Lucy) Qiu
papers.abstract_en: Abstract After growing steadily for decades, average U.S. household energy consumption began declining in the mid-2000s. Using household-level data from the Residential Energy Consumption Survey and Current Population Survey between 1990 and 2020, we decompose overall changes in per household consumption into three components: average income, cross-household income distribution, and consumption habits, which include energy efficiency. Growth of average income caused consumption to increase by 11%, and rising income inequality reduced consumption by 8%, nearly entirely offsetting the effect of income growth. Changes in habits also reduced consumption. Back-of-the-envelope calculations indicate an unexpected effect of rising income inequality: climate and air quality improvements valued at $9 billion in 2020 due to lower electricity consumption. The results indicate the importance of coordinating policies that address inequality and pollution.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：经过数十年的稳定增长，美国家庭平均能源消费量在21世纪中叶开始下降。利用1990年至2020年间住宅能源消费调查和当前人口调查的家庭级数据，我们将每户消费总量的变化分解为三个组成部分：平均收入、跨家庭收入分配和消费习惯（包括能源效率）。平均收入的增长导致消费增加了11%，而收入不平等的上升减少了消费8%，几乎完全抵消了收入增长的影响。习惯的变化也减少了消费。粗略计算表明，收入不平等上升有一个意外效果：由于电力消费降低，2020年气候和空气质量改善的价值达到90亿美元。结果表明，协调解决不平等和污染的政策的重要性。

papers.title_en: Entrepreneurial Migration
papers.title_zh: 创业型移民
papers.authors: Kevin A. Bryan, Jorge Guzman
papers.abstract_en: Abstract We track the movement of high-potential startups using cross-state business registrations and estimate the utility of cities to moving startups using a revealed preference approach. 6.6% of these startups move across state borders during their first five years. Startup hubs like Silicon Valley and Boston tend to lose startups to other cities. Our findings show that startups prefer traditional hubs when they move soon after being founded, but later prefer cities with lower taxes. This pattern is not due to vertical sorting or industrial specialization.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：我们通过跨州商业注册追踪高潜力初创企业的流动，并使用显示偏好方法估计城市对流动初创企业的效用。这些初创企业中有6.6%在成立后的前五年内跨越州界。硅谷和波士顿等初创企业中心倾向于失去流向其他城市。我们的发现表明，初创企业在成立后不久倾向于选择传统中心，但后来更倾向于选择税收较低的城市。这种模式并非由于垂直排序或产业专业化造成。

papers.title_en: Incorporating Social Welfare in Program-Evaluation and Treatment Choice
papers.title_zh: 将社会福利纳入项目评估和治疗选择
papers.authors: Debopam Bhattacharya, Tatiana Komarova
papers.abstract_en: Abstract We introduce a notion of money-metric social welfare for discrete choice under unrestricted heterogeneity and income effects. It is the maximized indirect utility under normalization of the outside option. It also equals the amount of income necessary to achieve a given level of utility, while certain choices are prohibited. We show that the distribution of this quantity is nonparametrically identified as a closed-form functional of average structural demand for the outside option, making it useful for cost-benefit analysis and optimal targeting. An illustration with private tuition subsidies in India shows that the income path of usage-maximizing subsidies differs significantly from welfare-maximizing ones.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：我们引入了一种在非限制性异质性和收入效应下的离散选择货币度量社会福利的概念。它是在外部选择标准化下最大化的间接效用。它也等于在某些选择被禁止的情况下，实现给定效用水平所需的收入金额。我们展示了这个量值的分布是非参数识别的，作为外部选择平均结构需求的封闭形式函数，使其适用于成本效益分析和最优定位。以印度的私人学费补贴为例，表明使用最大化补贴的收入路径与福利最大化补贴的收入路径有显著差异。

papers.title_en: Imperfect Private Information in Insurance Markets
papers.title_zh: 保险市场中的不完全私人信息
papers.authors: Adam Solomon
papers.abstract_en: Abstract This paper studies imperfectly perceived private information in insurance markets when contracts endogenously respond. Equilibrium contracts, pooling, and welfare depend on the joint distribution of risk and misperception. In the Health and Retirement Study (HRS), I show that misperceptions typically covary with (medical, long-term care, disability, and mortality) risk type: high types underperceive their risk and low types overperceive. I develop a general model and algorithm to estimate the equilibrium contracts, pooling, and welfare impact of misperceptions that is applicable in many settings. I offer suggestive evidence from U.S. annuity markets that contracts are distorted due to misperceptions, with welfare likely increasing.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：本文研究了在合同内生响应时保险市场中不完全被感知的私有信息。均衡合同、池化和福利取决于风险和误判的联合分布。在健康和退休研究（HRS）中，我展示了误判通常与（医疗、长期护理、残疾和死亡）风险类型共变：高风险类型低估了他们的风险，而低风险类型高估了。我开发了一个通用模型和算法来估计误判对均衡合同、池化和福利影响，这在许多设置中都是适用的。我从美国年金市场提供了暗示性证据，表明由于误判，合同被扭曲，福利可能会增加。

papers.title_en: How do bureaucrats respond to hybrid incentive contract? Evidence from China’s air pollution controls
papers.title_zh: 官员如何响应混合激励合同？来自中国空气污染控制的证据
papers.authors: Guangyu Cao, Xi Weng, Mingwei Xu, Li-An Zhou

papers.title_en: Burn now or never? Climate policy exposure and investment of fossil fuel firms
papers.title_zh: 现在燃烧还是永不燃烧？气候政策暴露与化石燃料公司的投资
papers.authors: Jakob Feveile Adolfsen, Malte Heissel, Ana-Simona Manu, Francesca Vinci

papers.title_en: The Productivity Effect of Public–Private Partnership
papers.title_zh: 公私合作的生产力效应
papers.authors: Vincenzo Mollisi
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT Public–Private partnerships (PPPs) are often employed by public authorities to deliver infrastructure and public services through contracts bundling construction, operation, and maintenance over extended periods. Using a novel dataset covering the universe of Italian district heating plants (DHs) from 2007 to 2014, I show that PPP improves firm‐level productivity by incentivizing investments in higher capital quality. Capital quality—proxied by a thermal density index derived from the characteristics of the DH pipeline network—significantly improves productivity only when combined with PPP procurement. A structural production function approach reveals that a one‐unit increase in capital quality raises output by 19% in PPP firms, with negligible effects in non‐PPP firms. Counterfactual calculations suggest that enforcing PPP‐like quality standards across all plants would increase average output by 3266 MWh and reduce CO 2 emissions by 1568 tons per plant per year. The results are robust to selection bias, measurement error, and functional form misspecification. While this paper provides the first evidence that PPPs enhance productivity in network utilities by internalizing technological externalities between construction and operation, whether these gains fully translate into welfare improvements through pricing and Value for Money remains an open question for future research.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：公私合作伙伴关系（PPPs）常被公共当局用来通过合同捆绑建设、运营和维护，长期提供基础设施和公共服务。利用覆盖2007至2014年意大利区域供热厂（DHs）的全新数据集，我展示了PPP通过激励对更高资本质量的投资，提高了企业层面的生产率。资本质量——由DH管道网络特征派生的热密度指数代理——仅在与PPP采购结合时显著提高生产率。结构生产函数方法揭示，在PPP企业中，资本质量每增加一个单位，产出提高19%，而在非PPP企业中影响微不足道。反事实计算表明，强制所有工厂执行类似PPP的质量标准，将使平均产出增加3266兆瓦时，并使每厂每年减少1568吨二氧化碳排放。结果对选择偏差、测量误差和函数形式误设具有鲁棒性。虽然本文首次提供了PPP通过内部化建设与运营之间的技术外部性来提高网络公用事业生产率的证据，但这些收益是否完全通过定价和物有所值转化为福利改善，仍是未来研究的开放问题。

papers.title_en: Transparency and Innovation in Organizations
papers.title_zh: 透明度与组织创新
papers.authors: Osamu Hayashida, Kimiyuki Morita, Takeharu Sogo
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT We study how transparency—the observability of interim performance measures—affects innovation incentives. In each of two periods, an agent selects either a new or well‐established idea and exerts effort to implement that idea into products or services. Transparency promotes idea exploration by allowing idea switching in response to negative signals. However, this can become counterproductive by wasting the knowledge acquired through implementation effort and reducing effort incentives if the output relies heavily on implementation effort rather than idea quality. Paradoxically, transparency can be further counterproductive if (1) the acquired knowledge becomes less idea‐specific, (2) the variance in idea quality increases, or (3) the interim performance measure becomes more precise.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：我们研究透明度——中间绩效指标的可观察性——如何影响创新激励。在两个时期中，代理人选择一个新想法或一个成熟的想法，并努力将该想法实施到产品或服务中。透明度通过允许在收到负面信号时切换想法来促进想法探索。然而，如果产出严重依赖于实施努力而不是想法质量，这可能会适得其反，浪费通过实施努力获得的知识，并减少努力激励。矛盾的是，如果（1）获得的知识变得不那么特定于想法，（2）想法质量的方差增加，或（3）中间绩效指标变得更加精确，透明度可能会进一步适得其反。

papers.title_en: Share to Scare: Technology Sharing in the Absence of Intellectual Property Rights
papers.title_zh: 分享以威慑：在缺乏知识产权的情况下的技术共享
papers.authors: Jos Jansen
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT Cournot duopolists choose between sharing their technologies, for example, through scientific publications, or keeping them secret. The disadvantage of sharing efficient technologies is that a less efficient competitor imitates and becomes tougher. The advantage is that the competitor learns that the sharing firm is tougher than expected. Limited technology diffusion occurs in equilibrium, with at most one firm sharing. Unilateral sharing incentives are strongest for intermediate technologies. For identical distributions skewed towards efficient technologies, this yields equilibria where one firm shares all or only intermediate technologies, besides an equilibrium without sharing. Further, I consider profit implications, non‐identical distributions, and several extensions.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：古诺双寡头企业选择共享技术，例如通过科学出版物，或保持技术秘密。共享高效技术的弊端在于效率较低的竞争对手会模仿并变得更具竞争力。好处在于竞争对手了解到共享企业比预期更具竞争力。在均衡中，技术扩散有限，最多只有一家企业共享技术。单方面共享激励对于中等技术最强。对于倾向于高效技术的相同分布，这会产生一个企业共享全部或仅中等技术，以及没有共享的均衡。此外，我还考虑了利润影响、非相同分布和几个扩展。

papers.title_en: Acquisitions, Innovation and the Entrenchment of Monopoly
papers.title_zh: 收购、创新与垄断的巩固
papers.authors: Vincenzo Denicolò, Michele Polo
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT We analyze a dynamic model of repeated innovation where inventors may either be acquired by an incumbent or else resist takeover and challenge for leadership. In the short run, acquisitions always spur innovation because of the invention‐for‐buyout effect. In the longer run, however, they may stifle it because of a countervailing effect, the entrenchment of monopoly. The latter occurs when the incumbent's dominance depends on past levels of activity and is therefore reinforced by recurrent acquisitions. We show that if the entrenchment effect is sufficiently strong, forward‐looking policymakers should prohibit acquisitions in anticipation of the long‐run negative impact on innovation. This argument sets out a new theory of harm that can be used to block acquisitions that could otherwise go unchallenged.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：我们分析了一个重复创新的动态模型，其中发明者可能被在位企业收购，或者抵抗收购并挑战领导地位。短期内，收购总是能刺激创新，因为存在为收购而发明的效应。然而，从长远来看，它们可能会抑制创新，因为存在一个相反的效应，即垄断的固化。当在位企业的主导地位依赖于过去的活动水平时，就会发生后者，因此被反复的收购所加强。我们表明，如果固化效应足够强，具有前瞻性的决策者应该禁止收购，以预期对创新的长期负面影响。这一论点提出了一个新的损害理论，可以用来阻止那些否则可能不受挑战的收购。

papers.title_en: Storage games
papers.title_zh: 存储博弈
papers.authors: Sergei Balakin, Guillaume Roger
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT We study a long‐horizon, oligopolistic market with random shocks to demand that can be arbitraged by two storage operators with finite capacity. This problem applies to any storable commodity—that is, most commodities. Because the arbitrage spread is so sensitive to market power, storage operators face strong incentives to restrain quantities by tacitly colluding. This cooperation takes new forms thanks to the multiplicity of actions they must take: selling, buying, or both. We construct payoff‐maximizing equilibria of this stochastic game, and uncover a new form of Partial Cooperation that trades off quantities and delay. While collusive, Partial Cooperation delivers higher consumer surplus thanks to the market power effect. Head‐on competition is not always an equilibrium of the long‐horizon game when market power becomes large enough. We draw implications for policy and suggest poorly competitive storage is a negative externality to the development of the underlying commodity—for example, renewable energy.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：我们研究了一个长期、寡头垄断市场，该市场受到需求随机冲击的影响，这些冲击可以被两个有限容量的存储运营商套利。这个问题适用于任何可储存商品，即大多数商品。由于套利价差对市场力量极为敏感，存储运营商面临强烈的动机，通过默契勾结来限制数量。由于他们必须采取多种行动：销售、购买或两者兼而有之，这种合作呈现出新的形式。我们构建了这个随机博弈的收益最大化均衡，并揭示了一种新的部分合作形式，即在数量和延迟之间进行权衡。尽管是勾结性的，部分合作由于市场力量效应，能够带来更高的消费者剩余。当市场力量变得足够大时，正面竞争并不总是长期博弈的均衡。我们为政策制定提出了启示，并建议竞争力不足的存储是底层商品发展（例如，可再生能源）的负外部性。

papers.title_en: The Political Economy of Patent Buyouts
papers.title_zh: 专利收购的政治经济学
papers.authors: Amal Ahmad, Dominik Naeher, Sebastian Vollmer
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT Incentivizing innovation through buyouts may alleviate the social costs associated with patent power, but the political economy and feasibility of this potentially important financing mechanism have been understudied. We study an international setting of countries with different innovation and financing capabilities, and where financing governments rely on taxes to fund buyouts and care about the electoral popularity of their decisions. Subsequent distributional conflict arises between countries as some may benefit from the now‐public knowledge without contributing equally to financing, whereas taxpayers within a country may disagree over the desired extent of tax financing for buyouts. We show that these conflicts reduce the feasibility of buyouts relative to patents, identify the conditions under which this harms global welfare, and discuss possibilities for overcoming these constraints. The international public good and public financing dimensions of buyouts emerge as essential for understanding their potential to supplant patents and to improve social welfare.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：通过收购激励创新可能减轻与专利权相关的社会成本，但这种潜在重要的融资机制的政治经济和可行性一直未被充分研究。我们研究了一个国际环境，其中不同国家的创新和融资能力各异，融资政府依赖税收来资助收购，并关心其决策的选举受欢迎程度。随后，国家之间出现了分配冲突，因为一些国家可能从现在公开的知识中受益，而没有平等地贡献资金，而一个国家的纳税人可能对税收资助收购的期望程度存在分歧。我们展示了这些冲突降低了收购相对于专利的可行性，确定了这种情况损害全球福利的条件，并讨论了克服这些限制的可能性。收购的国际公共产品和公共融资维度对于理解其取代专利和提高社会福利的潜力至关重要。

papers.title_en: Buyer‐Optimal Platform Design
papers.title_zh: 买家最优平台设计
papers.authors: Daniele Condorelli, Balazs Szentes
papers.abstract_en: ABSTRACT A platform matches a unit mass of sellers, each owning a single product of heterogeneous quality, to a unit mass of buyers with differing valuations for unit‐quality. After matching, sellers make take‐it‐or‐leave‐it price‐offers to buyers. Initially, valuations of buyers are only known to them and the platform, but sellers make inferences from the matching algorithm. The efficient matching is positive assortative, but buyer‐optimal matchings are stochastically negative assortative when there are few low‐value buyers (i.e., compared to lower‐quality sellers, high‐quality ones are matched to buyers with lower expected valuation). Although everyone trades, generating rents for the side lacking bargaining power results in inefficient matching.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：一个平台将拥有不同质量产品的单一卖家群体与对单位质量有不同估值的买家群体进行匹配。匹配后，卖家向买家提出接受或放弃的价格提议。最初，只有买家和平台知道买家的估值，但卖家会从匹配算法中推断信息。有效的匹配是正向选择性的，但在低价值买家较少时（即与低质量卖家相比，高质量卖家被匹配到预期估值较低的买家），买家最优匹配是随机负向选择性的。尽管每个人都进行交易，为缺乏议价能力的一方创造租金，但这导致了匹配的低效率。

papers.title_en: Legalization and innovation in the cannabis market
papers.title_zh: 大麻市场的合法化与创新
papers.authors: Lucy Xiaolu Wang, Nathan W. Chan

papers.title_en: Algorithmic collusion under sequential pricing and stochastic costs
papers.title_zh: 算法合谋下的顺序定价与随机成本
papers.authors: Gonzalo Ballestero

papers.title_en: Making sense of wickedness: Directionality heuristics for challenge-led innovation policy
papers.title_zh: 理解顽疾：面向挑战引领型创新政策的方向性启发式
papers.authors: Matthias Mueller, Michael P. Schlaile, Stephanie Lang, Matthijs J. Janssen, Iris Wanzenböck, Kristina Bogner, Jana Zscheischler, Michael Schramm, et al.

papers.title_en: Greening but concentrating? The unintended effects of China's voluntary participatory environmental regulations on firms' innovation portfolios
papers.title_zh: 绿色化但集中化？中国自愿性参与式环境规制对企业创新组合的意外效应
papers.authors: Dongyang Zhang, Dingchuan Bai, Yurun He, Rui Guo

papers.title_en: Identification of valuable patents: New indicators and effects of prediction time points
papers.title_zh: 识别有价值专利：新指标与预测时点效应
papers.authors: Chia-Yu Lai, Chih-Ping Wei, San-Yih Hwang

papers.title_en: Technological trajectories formatting the socio-institutional framework—the case of the addictive empire of the techno-oligarchs
papers.title_zh: 技术轨迹塑造社会制度框架——以技术寡头的上瘾帝国为例
papers.authors: Mariana Mortágua, Vicente Ferreira, Francisco Louçã
papers.abstract_en: Abstract Although the literature on technological change often discusses its social effects, it typically focusses either on the strictly technological dynamics of innovation or on the mismatch and rematch between its trajectory and the dominant socio-institutional framework. The explanation of the rematch is commonly associated with the collapse of the previous social restrictions, given the prevailing institutions’ inability to propel capital accumulation in the key-factor and carrier sectors and therefore to promote the expansion of the new techno-economic paradigm. This paper suggests a reappraisal of that view, exploring how a new technology, hyper-communication and social media, is reshaping the power relations, with the emergence of a techno-oligarchy. We conclude that this is a case of a technology molding the previous social framework through adaptation and creating new institutions and culture, which lead to a deep transformation, including of the status of human agency.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：尽管关于技术变革的文献经常讨论其社会效应，但通常要么关注创新的严格技术动态，要么关注其轨迹与主导社会制度框架之间的不匹配和再匹配。再匹配的解释通常与先前社会限制的崩溃联系在一起，因为占主导地位的机构无法在关键因素和载体部门推动资本积累，因此无法促进新技术经济范式的扩展。本文建议重新评估这一观点，探讨一项新技术——超通信和社交媒体——如何重塑权力关系，以及技术寡头的出现。我们得出结论，这是一个技术通过适应塑造先前社会框架、创造新机构和文化，从而导致深刻转变的案例，包括人类主体地位的转变。

papers.title_en: Productivity-enhancing employment reallocation during the Covid-19 pandemic
papers.title_zh: 新冠疫情期间提高生产率的就业重新分配
papers.authors: Tibor Lalinsky, Paloma Lopez-Garcia, Jaanika Meriküll
papers.abstract_en: Abstract This paper studies how the Covid-19 pandemic affected firm productivity. The focus is on the reallocation channel measured by the responsiveness of firm employment growth to productivity. The analysis leverages high-quality firm-level data covering 11 euro area countries over 2 decades, from the early 2000s to 2020 in most sample countries. The results show that: (1) Productivity-enhancing reallocation has weakened over time, with its contribution to aggregate productivity declining in the majority of the sample countries. (2) The strength of this reallocation process varies largely across countries, accounting for 0.7–5.2 log points of aggregate yearly productivity growth. (3) Various estimation approaches and productivity proxies suggest that productivity-enhancing reallocation was weaker in more countries during the pandemic than in the Great Recession.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要 本文研究了新冠疫情对企业生产率的影响。研究重点在于通过企业就业增长对生产率的响应性来衡量的资源重新配置渠道。分析利用了覆盖11个欧元区国家、从2000年代初至2020年的高质量企业层面数据。结果显示：（1）随时间推移，提高生产率的资源重新配置已减弱，在大多数样本国家中，其对总体生产率的贡献下降。（2）这一重新配置过程的强度在不同国家间差异较大，占总体年生产增长率的0.7-5.2对数点。（3）各种估计方法和生产率代理指标表明，在疫情期间，提高生产率的资源重新配置在更多国家中比在大萧条期间更弱。

papers.title_en: Growth, inequality, and declining business dynamism in a unified Schumpeter Mark I + II model
papers.title_zh: 标题：统一的熊彼特I+II模型中的增长、不平等和下降的企业活力
papers.authors: Patrick Mellacher
papers.abstract_en: Abstract I develop a Schumpeterian agent-based model in which the entry and exit of firms, their productivity and markup, the birth of new industries, and the social structure of the population are endogenous. I use this model to study the causes of rising inequality and declining “business dynamism” since the 1980s. My hybrid model combines features of (i) the so-called Schumpeter Mark I (centering around the entrepreneur), (ii) the Mark II model (emphasizing the innovative capacities of firms), and (iii) Cournot competition, with firms using ordinary least squares learning to estimate the market environment and the behavior of their competitors. A scenario that is quantitatively calibrated to US data on growth and inequality replicates a large number of stylized facts regarding the industry life cycle, growth, inequality, and all 10 stylized facts on “declining business dynamism” in the USA proposed by Akcigit and Ates (2021, AEJ: Macroeconomics, 13[1], 257–298). Counterfactual simulations show that antitrust policy is highly effective at combatting inequality and at increasing business dynamism and growth but is subject to a conflict of interest between workers and firm owners, as gross domestic product and wages grow at the expense of profits. I further explore how technological factors interact with “Mark I” and “Mark II” in my model to shape dynamics of growth, inequality, and business dynamism.
papers.abstract_zh: 摘要：我构建了一个基于施姆普特里安的代理模型，其中企业的进入和退出、它们的生产率和加成、新产业的诞生以及人口的社会结构都是内生的。我使用这个模型来研究自20世纪80年代以来不平等上升和“商业活力”下降的原因。我的混合模型结合了（i）所谓的施姆普特里安马克I（以企业家为中心）、（ii）马克II模型（强调企业的创新能力）和（iii）库诺竞争的特点，企业使用普通最小二乘学习来估计市场环境和竞争对手的行为。一个定量校准到美国增长和不平等数据的情景复制了大量关于产业生命周期、增长、不平等以及阿克西吉特和阿特斯（2021年，《美国经济杂志：宏观经济学》，13[1]，257-298）提出的关于美国“商业活力下降”的所有10个典型事实。反事实模拟表明，反垄断政策在打击不平等和增加商业活力和增长方面非常有效，但受到工人和企业主之间利益冲突的影响，因为国内生产总值和工资的增长是以牺牲利润为代价的。我进一步探讨了技术因素如何与我的模型中的“马克I”和“马克II”相互作用，以塑造增长、不平等和商业活力的动态。

papers.title_en: How Search Engine Impacts Market Structure: Empirical Evidence from a Multivendor Darknet Market
papers.title_zh: 搜索引擎如何影响市场结构：来自多供应商暗网市场的实证证据
papers.authors: Ying Lu, Dandan Qiao, Shu He, Bernard C. Y. Tan
papers.abstract_en: Despite the public’s familiarity with search engines, little existing research empirically investigates the impact of such a search-cost-reduction tool on online market structure. Knowledge scarcity of this question can mainly be attributed to the challenge of accessing detailed data from a cross-website search engine. Using data from the online illegal transaction platform, the Darknet markets, we manage to empirically evaluate the influence of a cross-website search engine (i.e., GRAMS) on the market structure at the vendor and product category levels. The results show that, although the search engine’s entry enhances the overall market performance, the benefit is more significant among leading vendors and popular products, contributing to a more concentrated market. Additional analyses provide empirical evidence that the trustworthiness and the scale-up ability of leading vendors can be the underlying mechanisms for the increased market concentration after the introduction of search engines into Darknet markets. Our study not only contributes to the literature on the dynamics of sales distribution in a multiple-vendor e-commerce market but also provides insights into understanding the operating dynamics of the Darknet markets, which can be helpful for law enforcement policymaking. This paper was accepted by D. J. Wu, information systems. Funding: D. Qiao acknowledges financial support from the Singapore Ministry of Education [Tier 1 Research Grant A-8001813-00-00]. S. He acknowledges financial support from the University of Florida, Warrington College of Business Summer 2022 Research Award. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.04133 .
papers.abstract_zh: 尽管公众对搜索引擎非常熟悉，但很少有现有研究实证调查这种降低搜索成本工具对在线市场结构的影响。对这个问题的知识匮乏主要可以归因于获取跨网站搜索引擎的详细数据的挑战。利用在线非法交易平台——暗网市场的数据，我们得以实证评估跨网站搜索引擎（即GRAMS）对卖家和产品类别层面市场结构的影响。结果显示，尽管搜索引擎的进入增强了整体市场表现，但领先卖家和热门产品中的好处更为显著，导致市场更加集中。额外的分析提供了实证证据，表明领先卖家的可信度和扩大规模能力可能是搜索引擎引入暗网市场后市场集中度增加的潜在机制。我们的研究不仅为多卖家电子商务市场中销售分布动态的文献做出了贡献，还为理解暗网市场的运作动态提供了洞见，这对执法政策制定可能有所帮助。本文由D. J. Wu，信息系统接受。资助：D. Qiao感谢新加坡教育部[Tier 1研究资助A-8001813-00-00]的财政支持。S. He感谢佛罗里达大学，沃灵顿商学院2022年夏季研究奖的财政支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.04133找到。

papers.title_en: Do Households React to Monetary Policy?
papers.title_zh: 家庭对货币政策有反应吗？
papers.authors: You Li, Weiqiang Tan, Daifei Yao, Jian Zhang
papers.abstract_en: We study how households understand and respond to monetary policy by exploiting the open auctions of early-stage crowdfunding and inferring individuals’ expectations based on their maximum requested interest rates. Using loan listings from Prosper, we find that borrowers adjust their willingness-to-pay interest rates in response to unexpected Federal funds rate changes, whereas anticipated shifts have negligible effects. These responses are more pronounced among high-income, high-credit-score borrowers; large loan applicants; and when Federal Reserve communication is transparent. The responses are highly asymmetric—Borrowers sharply lower rates during unexpected easing but resist increasing them during unexpected tightening. The results are robust to alternative specifications, including regression-discontinuity-in-time designs and alternative measures of monetary policy shock. Lenders also respond to policy shocks and counteract borrowers’ adjustments. Analysis of Robinhood data shows that retail investors mirror this behavior by reducing equity holdings after surprise rate hikes. This paper was accepted by Kay Giesecke, finance. Funding: This work was supported by the general research fund from the Research Grant Council of Hong Kong [Grant 17504925], the Dean’s Research Fund of the Faculty of Liberal Arts and Social Sciences, The Education University of Hong Kong [Grant FLASS/DRF 04635], the Faculty Research Grants of Macau University of Science and Technology [Grant FRG-24-019-MSB], the Seed Funding Grant of EdUHK [Grant 02C11], and the Block Grant Blueprint of EdUHK [Grant 02A23]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.04649 .
papers.abstract_zh: 我们通过利用早期众筹的公开拍卖和基于个人最大请求利率推断个体预期，研究家庭如何理解和响应货币政策。使用Prosper的贷款列表，我们发现借款人会根据意外的联邦基金利率变化调整他们愿意支付的利率，而预期的变动影响微乎其微。这些反应在高收入、高信用评分的借款人中更为明显；在大额贷款申请者中；以及在联邦储备沟通透明时。反应高度不对称——借款人在意外宽松期间大幅降低利率，但在意外紧缩期间则抵制提高利率。这些结果对替代规范具有鲁棒性，包括时间回归不连续设计和货币政策冲击的替代度量。贷款人也对政策冲击做出反应，并抵消借款人的调整。对Robinhood数据的分析显示，零售投资者通过在意外加息后减少股票持有量来模仿这种行为。本文由Kay Giesecke接受，金融。资金：这项工作得到了香港研究资助局的一般研究基金[Grant 17504925]、香港教育大学文理学院的院长研究基金[Grant FLASS/DRF 04635]、澳门科技大学的学院研究基金[Grant FRG-24-019-MSB]、EdUHK的种子基金[Grant 02C11]和EdUHK的区块资助蓝图[Grant 02A23]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2024.04649找到。

papers.title_en: Optimal Integration: Human, Machine, and Generative AI
papers.title_zh: 最优融合：人、机器与生成性AI
papers.authors: Hongda Zhong
papers.abstract_en: I study the optimal integration of humans and technologies in multilayered decision-making processes. When each layer can correct existing errors but may also introduce new errors, who should have the final authority? I show that a decision maker’s correction capability normalized by its new errors is a one-dimensional quality metric that determines the optimal rule: deploying higher quality technologies in later stages. Intriguingly, despite its highest quality, the final layer may not generate the greatest error reduction; instead, its role hinges on minimizing new errors. Human effort varies asymmetrically across layers: early stages exert relatively lower effort and prioritize error correction, whereas later stages exert higher effort and focus on avoiding new errors. Applying the model to artificial intelligence (AI) reveals that AI’s generative capabilities make it more likely to serve as the final decision maker, reducing the need for costly human input at the risks of AI hallucination. The theoretical framework also extends to applications including repeated delegation, automation design, loan screening, tenure review, and other multilayer decision-making scenarios. This paper has been accepted by Will Cong for the Virtual Special Issue on AI for Business and Finance Decisions.
papers.abstract_zh: 我研究了在多层次决策过程中人类和技术的最佳整合。当每一层都能纠正现有错误但也可能引入新错误时，谁应该拥有最终决定权？我展示了决策者纠正能力与其新错误之比是一个一维质量指标，决定了最佳规则：在后期部署更高质量的技术。有趣的是，尽管质量最高，最后一层可能不会带来最大的错误减少；相反，其作用取决于最小化新错误。人类努力在各层之间不对称变化：早期阶段投入相对较低的努力，优先纠正错误，而后期阶段投入更高的努力，专注于避免新错误。将模型应用于人工智能（AI）揭示了AI的生成能力使其更有可能成为最终决策者，减少了对昂贵的人类输入的需求，但存在AI幻觉的风险。理论框架也扩展到包括重复委托、自动化设计、贷款筛选、任期审查以及其他多层次决策场景的应用。本文已被Will Cong接受，用于AI在商业和金融决策中的虚拟特刊。

papers.title_en: Enterprise Risk Management and Management Earnings Forecasts
papers.title_zh: 企业风险管理与管理盈余预测
papers.authors: Chan Li, Kristin Stack, Lili Sun, Jianren Xu
papers.abstract_en: Enterprise risk management (ERM) is an institutional agenda emphasizing holistic risk oversight and strategic planning. This study examines whether and how the adoption of ERM affects management earnings forecasts. We first document that ERM adoption increases the likelihood and accuracy of management earnings forecasts. We then provide evidence that ERM adoption improves forecast quality by reducing the volatility of fundamentals and enhancing managers’ ability to assess both internal and external information. Finally, we find that the positive effect of ERM in improving forecast accuracy is more pronounced for long-horizon forecasts, consistent with ERM’s long-term strategic focus. Collectively, our results shed light on how ERM adoption improves the quality of a key voluntary disclosure—management forecasts. This paper was accepted by Ranjani Krishnan, accounting. Funding: C. Li thanks the C.A. Scupin professorship at the University of Kansas, L. Sun thanks the Barney A. Coda professorship at the University of North Texas, and J. Xu gratefully acknowledges the G. Brint Ryan College of Business Summer Research Grant at the University of North Texas. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.01120 .
papers.abstract_zh: 企业风险管理（ERM）是一项强调全面风险监督和战略规划的制度议程。本研究检验了ERM的采纳是否以及如何影响管理层盈利预测。我们首先记录了ERM的采纳增加了管理层盈利预测的可能性和准确性。然后，我们提供了证据，表明ERM的采纳通过降低基本面的波动性并增强管理者评估内部和外部信息的能力，提高了预测质量。最后，我们发现ERM在提高预测准确性方面的积极效应对于长期预测更为显著，这与ERM的长期战略重点一致。总体而言，我们的结果揭示了ERM采纳如何提高关键自愿披露——管理层预测的质量。本文由Ranjani Krishnan接受，会计学。资金：C. Li感谢堪萨斯大学的C.A. Scupin教授职位，L. Sun感谢北德克萨斯大学的Barney A. Coda教授职位，J. Xu感谢北德克萨斯大学G. Brint Ryan商学院夏季研究资助。补充材料：数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.01120获取。

papers.title_en: The Adoption of Central Bank Digital Currency
papers.title_zh: 中央银行数字货币的采纳
papers.authors: Emilio Barucci, Matteo Brachetta, Daniele Marazzina
papers.abstract_en: We investigate the adoption of Central Bank digital currency (CBDC) in a partial equilibrium setting, focusing on four key features: remuneration, monetary incentives, interoperability, and architecture. Agents are interested in adopting CBDC because they have a preference for digital payments, and the Central Bank may incentivize adoption through subsidies and platform development, potentially in collaboration with the private sector. Our results demonstrate that both the remuneration scheme and monetary incentives significantly influence the adoption rate and transaction volume. Calibrating the model for the digital euro case study, we show that the target of 60% of the population using CBDC can be achieved, provided that platform productivity is substantially enhanced. Although this target is feasible within a one-layer architecture, it becomes significantly more challenging in a two-layer setting. CBDC is likely to win the adoption battle against stablecoins but is likely to lose it against debit cards. This paper has been This paper was accepted by Will Cong for the Virtual Special Issue on Digital Finance. Funding: This project has been partially funded by the European Union – Next Generation EU – PNRR project SERICS “Security and Rights in the CyberSpace” (PE00000014 – CUP B53C22003990006) – SPOKE 9. Supplemental Material: The data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01504 .
papers.abstract_zh: 我们在一个局部均衡框架下研究中央银行数字货币（CBDC）的采用情况，重点关注四个关键特征：报酬机制、货币激励、互操作性和架构。代理人之所以愿意采用CBDC，是因为他们偏好数字支付，中央银行可能通过补贴和平台开发来激励采用，可能与私营部门合作。我们的结果表明，报酬机制和货币激励显著影响采用率和交易量。针对数字欧元案例研究校准模型，我们展示了在平台生产力大幅提升的情况下，60%的人口使用CBDC的目标是可以实现的。虽然这个目标在单层架构下是可行的，但在双层架构下变得更加具有挑战性。CBDC很可能在采用竞争中战胜稳定币，但很可能输给借记卡。本文已被Will Cong接受为数字金融虚拟特刊。资金来源：该项目部分由欧盟——下一代欧盟——PNRR项目SERICS“网络空间中的安全与权利”（PE00000014——CUP B53C22003990006）——SPOKE 9资助。补充材料：数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.01504获取。

papers.title_en: Does Trading Spur Specialization? Evidence from Patenting
papers.title_zh: 贸易是否促进专业化？来自专利的证据
papers.authors: Pengfei Han, Chunrui Liu, Xuan Tian
papers.abstract_en: We study how the market for technology (facilitated by the establishment of patent exchanges in China) affects innovation specialization. We find that the market for technology induces (i) specialization between patent buyers and sellers, (ii) specialization between patent licensors and licensees, and (iii) specialization based on a firm’s research and development efficiency. All these three specialization patterns indicate that the market for technology promotes comparative advantage–based innovation specialization. Firms with a comparative advantage in creating innovation redirect their resources toward producing patents, whereas firms with a comparative advantage in commercializing innovation switch their effort toward launching new products. A firm also shrinks its scope of innovation and invents in technological fields with greater proximity. Financial friction hampers innovation specialization and relieving trading friction in the market for technology mitigates such negative consequences. This paper was accepted by Lin William Cong, finance. Funding: P. Han acknowledges financial support from the China’s Natural Science Foundation [Grant 72103003]. C. Liu acknowledges financial support from the China’s Natural Science Foundation [Grant 72202034]. X. Tian acknowledges financial support from the China’s Natural Science Foundation [Grant 72425002]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03174 .
papers.abstract_zh: 我们研究了技术市场（由中国建立的专利交易所促进）如何影响创新专业化。我们发现技术市场促使（i）专利买家和卖家之间的专业化，（ii）专利许可方和被许可方之间的专业化，以及（iii）基于公司研发效率的专业化。这三种专业化模式都表明，技术市场促进了基于比较优势的创新专业化。具有创新创造比较优势的公司将资源重新配置到生产专利上，而具有创新商业化比较优势的公司则将努力转向推出新产品。公司还缩小了创新范围，并在技术领域中发明更接近的领域。金融摩擦阻碍了创新专业化，而减轻技术市场交易摩擦则缓解了这种负面影响。本文由林威廉·聪（Lin William Cong）接受，财务。资助：P. 韩感谢中国国家自然科学基金[Grant 72103003]的财政支持。C. 刘感谢中国国家自然科学基金[Grant 72202034]的财政支持。X. 田感谢中国国家自然科学基金[Grant 72425002]的财政支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在 https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03174 查阅。

papers.title_en: Upfront Commitment in Online Resource Allocation with Patient Customers
papers.title_zh: 在线资源分配中的预先承诺与耐心客户
papers.authors: Negin Golrezaei, Evan Yao
papers.abstract_en: In many online platforms like ride-sharing or grocery delivery, some demand agents can wait for a short period of time for a service if they are assured of its eventual provision within an acceptable delay. We study these “partially patient” agents in the context of an online resource allocation problem, contrasting them with impatient agents who require immediate service. We utilize a relaxed notion of competitive ratio, known as the resource/feature augmented competitive ratio, allowing online algorithms to benefit from additional features not available to the optimal offline algorithm. We introduce a class of polytope-based resource allocation (POLYRA) algorithms that achieve optimal or near-optimal competitive ratios by consulting specific polytopes and maintaining feasible algorithm states within these polytopes. For two or three types of agents, these algorithms can achieve the optimal competitive ratio. For more than three types, we present a near-optimal nested POLYRA algorithm that secures at least 80% of the optimal ratio. Our theoretical findings are supported by numerical analysis, highlighting the efficiency of our algorithms beyond adversarial arrivals and the modified competitive ratio framework. This paper was accepted by Chung Piaw Teo, optimization and decision analytics. Supplemental Material: The online appendices and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03335 .
papers.abstract_zh: 在许多在线平台，如拼车或杂货配送中，一些需求方可以等待一段时间以获得服务，前提是他们确信服务最终会在可接受的延迟内提供。我们研究这些“部分耐心”的代理，并将它们与需要即时服务的不耐烦代理进行对比，这是在在线资源分配问题的背景下进行的。我们采用了一种放宽的竞争比概念，即资源/特征增强竞争比，允许在线算法从最优离线算法无法获得的额外特征中受益。我们引入了一类基于多面体的资源分配（POLYRA）算法，这些算法通过咨询特定的多面体并保持这些多面体内的可行算法状态，实现了最优或接近最优的竞争比。对于两种或三种类型的代理，这些算法可以实现最优的竞争比。对于超过三种类型，我们提出了一个接近最优的嵌套POLYRA算法，至少确保80%的最优比率。我们的理论发现得到了数值分析的支持，突出了我们的算法在对抗性到达和修改后的竞争比框架之外的效率。本文由Chung Piaw Teo接受，优化和决策分析。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2022.03335找到。

papers.title_en: Unearthing Financial Statement Fraud: Insights from News Coverage Analysis
papers.title_zh: 标题：挖掘财务报表欺诈：新闻报道分析的洞见
papers.authors: Jianqing Fan, Qingfu Liu, Bo Wang, Kaixin Zheng
papers.abstract_en: We propose a financial statement (FS) fraud detection framework, called PeerMeta, that makes improvements in all three components of the detection procedure: label measurement, feature set, and detection model. For the label measurement, prior studies mainly adopt FS fraud events that have already been disclosed and confirmed. We construct a new measure based on news coverage that can reflect unrevealed FS fraud behaviors as well. For the feature set, we innovatively add peer factors learned through the business description texts in financial reports. For the detection model, two meta-learning algorithms are applied to aggregate the 19 popular classifiers. The results indicate that the proposed method has amazingly high recall of real fraud cases announced by regulatory authorities, reaching a staggering value of 0.982. We document that all components in PeerMeta contribute to the improvements of FS fraud detection and also showcase the significant economic value of the detection framework and find that recall is more crucial for the economic value than precision. This paper was accepted by Agostino Capponi, finance. Funding: This work was supported by the National Natural Science Foundation of China [Grants 71991470, 7199471, 72121002, 72310107002] and the National Key R&D Program of China [Grant 2021YFC3340703]. Supplemental Material: The online appendix and data files are available at https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03604 .
papers.abstract_zh: 我们提出了一个财务报表（FS）欺诈检测框架PeerMeta，该框架在检测程序的三个组成部分：标签测量、特征集和检测模型上都进行了改进。在标签测量方面，先前的研究主要采用已经披露和确认的FS欺诈事件。我们基于新闻报道构建了一个新的度量标准，也能反映未被揭露的FS欺诈行为。在特征集方面，我们创新性地添加了通过财务报告中的业务描述文本学习到的同业因素。在检测模型方面，应用了两种元学习算法来聚合19种流行的分类器。结果表明，所提出的方法在监管机构宣布的真实欺诈案例的召回率惊人地高，达到了0.982的惊人值。我们记录了PeerMeta的所有组成部分对FS欺诈检测的改进，并展示了检测框架的重要经济价值，发现召回率对于经济价值比精确度更为关键。本文由Agostino Capponi审稿，资金支持：这项工作得到了国家自然科学基金[Grants 71991470, 7199471, 72121002, 72310107002]和中国国家重点研发计划[Grant 2021YFC3340703]的支持。补充材料：在线附录和数据文件可在https://doi.org/10.1287/mnsc.2023.03604 查阅。
